compatible_controller_series: CONTROLLER 69 PRO, CONTROLLER 69 PRO+, CONTROLLER AI+
notes: Current model features cool + warm mist with UV-C water sterilisation. 330W is warm-mist mode peak (heating element); cool-mist mode draws substantially less power (estimated ~30–50 W). mist_output_ml_h_min calculated (9000 ml / 80 h runtime). external_probe_included inferred from T3/T7 series standard and confirmed in prior T5 generation. Amazon.de ASIN B0FGG7CV19 is the warm-mist version; older cool-mist-only T5 may still be sold at some retailers. Price from acinfinity.eu.
